title: Voice Pipeline Single vs Multi-Turn Execution
single_turn_flow: async for text_event in workflow.run(input_text): output._add_text(text_event)
Return StreamedAudioResult immediately (task runs in background)
multi_turn_flow: Try: async for intro_text in workflow.on_start(): output._add_text(intro_text)
LOOP: async for input_text in transcription_session.transcribe_turns():
async for text_event in result: output._add_text(text_event)
Return StreamedAudioResult immediately (task runs in background)
single_agent_workflow_run_flow: async for chunk in VoiceWorkflowHelper.stream_text_from(result): yield chunk
└─ stream_text_from: filters raw_response_event / response.output_text.delta -> yields delta

VoicePipeline.constructor_args: workflow: VoiceWorkflowBase, stt_model, tts_model, config: VoicePipelineConfig
VoicePipeline.lazy_model_init: models resolved via config.model_provider on first use

optional_methods: on_start() -> AsyncIterator[str]  (default: no-op, used for greeting in multi-turn)

SingleAgentVoiceWorkflow.run_method: appends to history, calls Runner.run_streamed, yields text chunks, updates history + agent

key_relationships: VoicePipeline composes STTModel + TTSModel (lazy via VoicePipelineConfig.model_provider)
Multi-turn loop driven by STTModel.create_session() -> TranscriptionSession.transcribe_turns()
important_notes: Both paths return StreamedAudioResult immediately; actual processing runs as background asyncio.Task
single-turn: AudioInput is a static buffer; one transcription -> one workflow run -> done
multi-turn: StreamedAudioInput is a stream; on_start() optional greeting -> loop over transcribe_turns()
multi-turn loop end condition: transcription_session.transcribe_turns() async iterator exhausted (stream closed)
SingleAgentVoiceWorkflow persists _input_history and _current_agent across turns (supports handoffs)
TraceCtxManager wraps entire session for observability; trace_id auto-generated
Error handling: errors emitted to output via _add_error(e) before re-raising
